sections.changelog:
Version 0.0.5

  • Renamed main plugin file to solvex-ai-blogger.php and text domain to solvex-ai-blogger per WordPress Plugin Review Team feedback.
  • Renamed internal constants from AUTOAIB_ to SOLVEX_AIB_ and option key from autoaib_settings to solvex_aib_settings.
  • Expanded External Services disclosure to cover token-usage endpoint, image downloads, and Unsplash/Pixabay CDNs.
  • Simplified REST settings-update permission check to require manage_options only.

Version 0.0.4

  • Renamed plugin from Auto AI Blogger to Solvex AI Blogger.

Version 0.0.3

  • WordPress plugin review team improvements.

Version 0.0.2

  • Improvement: Feedback as per WordPress plugin review team has been implemented.

Version 0.0.1

  • Initial Release.
